team.name: Scout
team.roleDesc: Monitors LinkedIn, industry news, and competitor activity to identify high-value opportunities. The front-line eyes of the fleet.

team.name: Echo
team.roleDesc: Drafts high-engagement posts, suggest content for TikTok/YouTube, and manages the social calendar. Amplifies the brand voice.

team.name: Closer
team.roleDesc: Inputs leads into the CRM, drafts personalized outreach emails, and coordinates follow-ups with humans-in-the-loop.

projects.title: Lead Pipeline (CRM)
projects.summary: (Sample Project) Our definitive 'Northstar' test case—similar to the Northwind example. A high-fidelity React/FastAPI prototype managed autonomously by the fleet to demonstrate autonomous lead discovery and CRM synchronization.

projects.title: Content Calendar
projects.summary: Autonomous content planning. Echo suggests the posts, you hit 'Publish'. Complete with AI video generation hooks.
